name: Creamy Dill Pork Tenderloin
headline: with Couscous & Green Beans
description: Another work day, another dinner daydream. You know what we mean. You’re sitting at your desk and 2:00 p.m. rolls around. Suddenly, all you can think is, “Dinner...what the heck am I going to eat for dinner?!” Well, we’ve got you covered, and FYI, the answer to that question is pretty darn delicious. We’re serving up succulent pork tenderloin with roasted green beans and savory couscous. To finish things off, the pork is drizzled with a life-affirming creamy dill sauce. Talk about a dream come true!
